title: Practice Admin Ingredient Path Tail-Hop Undo Scaffold
goal: practice admin에서 잘못 append한 ingredient location_path의 마지막 hop만 안전하게 제거할 수 있게 하여 append-only authoring의 correction 구멍을 최소 범위로 메운다
constraints: tail hop delete only; no reorder; no seq renumber; no migration/RPC; no CSS file change; stale async guard 유지; summary counts unchanged; extra_changes baseline은 이번 세션 시작 git status --short 기준
acceptance: npm run build pass; npm run lint pass with only existing src/hooks/useGameTick.ts:73 warning 1건 유지; @self-reviewer approved; npx tsc --noEmit pass; npx vitest run src/lib/practice/__tests__/adminView.test.ts pass; npx vitest run src/lib/practice/__tests__/menuView.test.ts pass; npx vitest run src/lib/practice/__tests__/sessionView.test.ts pass; npx vitest run src/lib/practice/engine/__tests__/ingredientAdd.test.ts pass; npx vitest run src/lib/practice/engine/__tests__/phaseAdvance.test.ts pass; /practice/admin에서 path 길이 2 이상인 ingredient node는 마지막 hop만 제거 가능; 제거 직후 row의 path 표시는 즉시 갱신되고 summary 카운트는 불변; path 길이 1 node는 삭제 불가; files_changed는 scope + 허용 보조 파일만; extra_changes false
result: build pass; lint pass with pre-existing useGameTick warning 1 only; self-reviewer pass 14/14; tsc pass; targeted vitest 132/132 pass; extra_changes false
